message: I work in Claude Code (the agentic CLI coding tool). I keep seeing vector / embedding databases mentioned for agent memory and semantic search. Practically: how does one get a vector database working WITH Claude Code — what's the integration path (an MCP server? a custom tool? an indexing pipeline?) — and concretely what does it give the system that plain file reads and grep/ripgrep search don't? Please search the web for current tools, named projects, and real setups people use. I want enough substance to decide whether and how to set one up for a flat-file knowledge library.
